executive_summary_zh: 今天最有信号的是 GitHub 把“代理式编码工作流”真正落到了 GitHub Actions 与企业治理面：Agentic Workflows 进入公开预览，并进一步支持仅用 GITHUB_TOKEN 运行，显著降低了企业接入门槛与密钥管理风险。
对工程负责人更重要的不是单点功能，而是组合变化：Bot PR 可在人工批准后跑 CI、代理工作流可复用现有 runner 与策略、组织计费和权限边界被显式建模，这说明 AI coding agent 正在被纳入标准软件交付控制面。
其余高信号更新集中在可运维性与治理：Copilot CLI 引入 schema-driven 的统一 /settings，GHES 3.21 带来基于组织元数据的规则集定向与大规模 Actions 可视化改进，都是把 AI/自动化纳入企业平台工程体系的基础设施变化。
executive_summary_en: The strongest signal today is GitHub operationalizing agentic coding workflows inside the GitHub Actions and enterprise governance surface: Agentic Workflows entered public preview, and they now support GITHUB_TOKEN-only execution, materially lowering enterprise adoption friction and secret-management risk.

What matters most is the combined pattern rather than any single feature: bot PRs can run CI after approval, agentic workflows reuse existing runners and policies, and org billing plus permission boundaries are made explicit—showing AI coding agents being absorbed into the standard software delivery control plane.

The other high-signal updates are about operability and governance: Copilot CLI gained a schema-driven unified /settings surface, and GHES 3.21 adds org-metadata-based rules targeting plus large-workflow usability improvements, both of which help fold AI and automation into enterprise platform engineering.

items.title: GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview
items.summary_zh: GitHub 将 Agentic Workflows 公开预览，允许团队用自然语言 Markdown 定义代理式自动化，再编译成标准 GitHub Actions YAML，用于 issue triage、CI 失败分析、文档更新等推理型任务。其关键点在于这些工作流并不是一个旁路系统，而是直接复用现有 Actions runner、runner group 和策略约束。
items.summary_en: GitHub launched Agentic Workflows in public preview, letting teams define agentic automations in natural-language Markdown and compile them into standard GitHub Actions YAML for tasks like issue triage, CI failure analysis, and docs updates. The key point is that this is not a sidecar system: it reuses existing Actions runners, runner groups, and policy constraints.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这是 AI coding agent 从“IDE 辅助”走向“平台级自动化”的重要一步。对后端和平台负责人来说，价值不只是自动化任务本身，而是把代理行为纳入既有 CI/CD、审计、权限和执行隔离模型，降低了在企业环境中引入 agent 的制度与运维成本。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is a meaningful step from IDE assistance to platform-level agent automation. For backend and platform leaders, the value is not just task automation but the fact that agent behavior is being brought under existing CI/CD, audit, permission, and execution-isolation models, reducing institutional and operational friction for enterprise adoption.
key_takeaways_zh: 代理工作流以 Markdown 定义、编译为标准 Actions YAML，意味着可被现有仓库流程、审计和变更管理接住。
GitHub 明确强调 security-first，并复用现有 runner/policy 体系，说明其定位是企业内可治理的 agent automation，而非仅面向个人开发者的实验功能。
key_takeaways_en: Workflows are defined in Markdown and compiled into standard Actions YAML, which means they fit existing repo workflows, auditing, and change management.
GitHub explicitly positions this as security-first and built on existing runner/policy infrastructure, signaling enterprise-governable agent automation rather than a developer-only experiment.

items.title: Agentic workflows no longer need a personal access token
items.summary_zh: GitHub Agentic Workflows 现在可直接使用 GitHub Actions 内建的 GITHUB_TOKEN，无需再为自动化创建和保存长期 PAT。若在组织拥有的仓库中运行，并启用相应 Copilot 策略与权限配置，AI credits 可直接计费到组织。
items.summary_en: GitHub Agentic Workflows can now use the built-in GitHub Actions GITHUB_TOKEN, removing the need to create and store long-lived PATs for automation. In org-owned repositories, with the right Copilot policy and permissions, AI credits can be billed directly to the organization.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这条更新的实际意义甚至可能高于“公开预览”本身：企业采用 agent 自动化最大的障碍往往是凭证治理、密钥轮换和计费归属。用 GITHUB_TOKEN 替代 PAT，把 agent 能力带回短期令牌、最小权限和现有安全边界，是平台化落地的关键一步。
items.why_it_matters_en: This change may matter even more operationally than the preview itself: one of the biggest blockers to enterprise agent adoption is credential governance, token rotation, and billing ownership. Replacing PATs with GITHUB_TOKEN brings agent automation back into short-lived tokens, least-privilege patterns, and existing security boundaries.
key_takeaways_zh: 从 PAT 转向 GITHUB_TOKEN，显著降低了长生命周期凭证在 agent 自动化中的安全与运维负担。
组织计费依赖显式策略开关和权限声明（如 copilot-requests: write），说明 GitHub 正把 agent 消耗与权限模型产品化。
key_takeaways_en: Moving from PATs to GITHUB_TOKEN materially reduces the security and operations burden of long-lived credentials in agent automation.
Org billing depends on explicit policy enablement and permission declarations such as copilot-requests: write, showing GitHub productizing the permission and cost model around agent usage.

items.title: Bot-created pull requests can run workflows if approved
items.summary_zh: 由 github-actions[bot] 创建的 Pull Request 现在在具备写权限的用户批准后，可以运行 CI/CD workflows。此前这类 PR 可能无法跑 CI，导致机器人生成的改动在未经过完整验证的情况下被误合并。
items.summary_en: Pull requests created by github-actions[bot] can now run CI/CD workflows after approval by a user with write access. Previously, such PRs might not run CI at all, creating a path for bot-generated changes to be merged without full validation.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 随着 AI agent 和自动化 bot 开始主动提交代码，传统“fork PR 安全模型”与自动化提交之间的冲突会变成新的交付风险点。这个改动给出一个清晰模式：允许 bot 代码进入标准 CI，但必须通过人工批准建立信任边界。
items.why_it_matters_en: As AI agents and automation bots increasingly author code changes, the conflict between traditional PR security models and automated contributions becomes a delivery risk. This update establishes a clear pattern: bot-authored code can enter standard CI, but only after human approval creates a trust boundary.
key_takeaways_zh: Bot 生成代码不应绕过 CI；批准后可运行 workflow，是兼顾安全与交付完整性的折中设计。
这为未来 agent 提交代码、开 PR、修复 CI 等闭环自动化提供了必要基础设施。
key_takeaways_en: Bot-generated code should not bypass CI; allowing workflows after approval is a pragmatic balance between security and delivery integrity.
This creates necessary infrastructure for closed-loop automation where agents open PRs, fix failures, and iterate through normal validation gates.

items.title: Copilot CLI: Configure everything from one place with /settings
items.summary_zh: GitHub Copilot CLI 引入统一的 /settings 配置面板，基于 schema-driven 设计，支持全屏交互式配置、内联设置、重置默认值，以及带描述和允许值的补全。此前分散在多个命令或手工编辑配置文件中的选项被收敛到统一模型中。
items.summary_en: GitHub Copilot CLI added a unified /settings surface built on a schema-driven design, supporting full-screen interactive configuration, inline setting updates, reset-to-default, and completion with descriptions and allowed values. Settings previously scattered across commands or manual config edits are now centralized in one model.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 表面看是 UX 改进，实质上是 agent/CLI 工具可管理性增强。对平台团队而言，schema 化配置是后续做自动配置、策略校验、团队标准化、文档生成甚至机器可读治理的前提。
items.why_it_matters_en: This looks like a UX improvement, but the deeper signal is manageability for agentic CLI tooling. For platform teams, schema-based configuration is a prerequisite for automation, policy validation, team standardization, documentation generation, and machine-readable governance.
key_takeaways_zh: CLI 配置被显式 schema 化，意味着未来更容易做脚本化、模版化和策略检查。
tab completion 暴露 key、类型和可选值，降低了团队推广 CLI agent 工具时的学习与误配成本。
key_takeaways_en: CLI configuration is now explicitly schema-based, making scripting, templating, and policy checks easier over time.
Tab completion exposes keys, types, and allowed values, reducing onboarding and misconfiguration costs when standardizing CLI agent tooling across teams.

items.title: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available
items.summary_zh: GHES 3.21 正式发布，重点包括组织自定义属性（可用元数据自动定向企业 rulesets）、Projects hierarchy view、REST API 2026-03-10、新的 Actions 工作流页面性能改进，以及 secret scanning 的企业级治理增强。
items.summary_en: GHES 3.21 is generally available with highlights including organization custom properties for targeting enterprise rulesets via metadata, Projects hierarchy view, REST API version 2026-03-10, improved Actions workflow-page performance, and stronger enterprise-level secret scanning governance.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 对大型企业平台团队，最关键的不是单个功能，而是“以组织元数据驱动策略”的方向。随着 AI 生成代码和 agent 自动化增加，规则集、代码安全和例外管理必须更细粒度地按组织属性分层治理。
items.why_it_matters_en: For large enterprise platform teams, the key signal is not any individual feature but the move toward metadata-driven policy targeting. As AI-generated code and agent automation increase, rulesets, code security, and exception handling need finer-grained governance by organizational attributes.
key_takeaways_zh: 组织自定义属性 GA 让企业能把治理策略从静态仓库列表，升级为基于元数据的动态定向。
Actions 大工作流页面的 lazy loading 与过滤改进，反映出企业流水线规模持续增大，平台可观测性成为刚需。
key_takeaways_en: Organization custom properties reaching GA lets enterprises move from static repo lists to metadata-driven dynamic policy targeting.
Lazy loading and filtering for large Actions workflows reflects growing CI graph scale and the need for better platform observability.

top_items: GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview
Agentic workflows no longer need a personal access token
Bot-created pull requests can run workflows if approved
new_terms_zh: Agentic Workflows：用自然语言定义、编译为 GitHub Actions 的代理式自动化工作流。
copilot-requests: write：用于允许代理工作流代表组织消耗 Copilot/AI 请求并计费的权限声明。
组织自定义属性（Organization custom properties）：给组织打元数据标签并据此自动应用企业规则集的治理机制。
new_terms_en: Agentic Workflows: agent-defined automations written in natural language and compiled into GitHub Actions.
copilot-requests: write: a permission declaration enabling agent workflows to make Copilot/AI requests billed to the organization.
Organization custom properties: metadata tags on organizations used to target enterprise rulesets automatically.
themes_zh: AI coding agent 正在从个人助手转向企业交付控制面的一部分。
安全边界、权限模型与组织计费正在成为 agent 采用的核心设计维度。
开发者工具配置与治理能力正在走向 schema 化和平台化。
themes_en: AI coding agents are moving from personal assistants into the enterprise software delivery control plane.
Security boundaries, permission models, and organizational billing are becoming core design dimensions for agent adoption.
Developer-tool configuration and governance are becoming more schema-driven and platform-oriented.
implications_zh: 如果你在评估内部 coding agent 或 repo automation，应优先选择能复用现有 CI/CD、审计和权限体系的方案，而不是引入平行执行面。
需要重新审视 bot/agent 提交代码的验证路径：PR 审批、CI 触发、安全令牌、组织计费和异常处理要形成闭环。
平台团队可以开始把 agent 工作流视为标准工程资产：纳入模板库、策略检查、成本归因和运行时可观测性。
implications_en: If you are evaluating internal coding agents or repo automation, prefer approaches that reuse existing CI/CD, audit, and permission systems rather than introducing a parallel execution plane.
You should revisit the validation path for bot- and agent-authored code: PR approval, CI triggering, security tokens, org billing, and exception handling need to form a closed loop.
Platform teams can start treating agent workflows as standard engineering assets, with templates, policy checks, cost attribution, and runtime observability.
reading_order: GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview
Agentic workflows no longer need a personal access token
Bot-created pull requests can run workflows if approved
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available
Copilot CLI: Configure everything from one place with /settings
what_to_ignore_zh: AI usage report updates：更偏计费字段修复与报表口径调整，运营相关但技术信号弱。
New runner images in public preview：对特定 CI 基础设施用户有用，但与 AI coding/agent 主题的关联较弱。
what_to_ignore_en: AI usage report updates: mostly a billing-field fix and reporting semantics change, operationally relevant but low technical signal.
New runner images in public preview: useful for specific CI infrastructure users, but weakly connected to the AI coding/agent theme.
